sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_test (id UInt32, s2index UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, s2ToGeo(s2index) AS coordinates FROM geo_test WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE geo_test SET s2index = 4704772434919038108 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, s2ToGeo(s2index) AS coordinates FROM geo_test WHERE s2index > 4704772434919038100;
